{{Quote|Armor serves no purpose if one feelz pain when it is struck.|Bela Hara|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Bela Hara''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]], who was the hatchmate of [[Tesar Sebatyne]] and [[Krasov Hara]]. Bela was trained in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by [[Saba Sebatyne]] and was a member of the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], known as the [[Wild Knights]], that was formed by her Master. Bela participated in several campaigns throughout the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]; most notably she was a member of the [[Myrkr strike team]] and was one of many to die during that disastrous [[Mission to Myrkr|mission]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Due to Barabel mating customs, it was impossible for Bela to know if she shared a father with [[Tesar Sebatyne]]. However, while aware that she was definitely the sister of [[Krasov Hara]], the two referred to themselves as hatchmates, along with Tesar. The three were each trained in the ways of the Jedi by Tesar's mother, [[Saba Sebatyne]]. Bela's experiences with her two hatchmates resulted in them sharing an extremely strong connection through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], which served them well as members of the Wild Knights; allowing them to sense the intentions and feelings of the others during combat.

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
{{Quote|I need some Jedi in my squadron. I need some Barabel Jedi.|[[Kyp Durron]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star" />}}
After Saba decided that her three apprentices would go to the [[Jedi academy]] to continue their Force training under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], the Wild Knights set out for [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. However, the academy had been destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and the squadron was forced to fight its way through Yuuzhan Vong held space to rendezvous with the [[New Jedi Order]].

The three hatchmates were then nominated by Master Skywalker to aid in a mission to hunt voxyn. The team was tasked with gaining voxyn samples so as to help [[Cilghal]] confirm her theory that voxyn came from a common template. During this mission a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ship was attacked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and the hatchmates impressed their fellow Jedi, including [[Kyp Durron]], with their control of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Force-meld|battle meld]].

Bela, along with Tesar and Krasov, chose to go to [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] as part of the [[Myrkr strike team|strike team]]. Bela became the fourth Jedi to die during the disastrous mission, after having been bitten by an [[amphistaff]]. Tesar and Krasov used [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] to levitate the body of their beloved hatchmate for some time, until they were forced to use it to lure out feral voxyn; they felt that Bela would have been honored to help her hatchmates, and the remainder of the strike team to escape. Shortly after Bela's death, Krasov was killed when a voxyn spat acid at her face.
